JUDGE ROBERT BARCLAY, REPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. EUGENE A. VLAHOS DEFT. IN PRO PER UNLAWFUL DETAINER 11:30 AM C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PLTF. OPENING STATEMENT. PLTF. WITS, RICHARD BRANNON S&E. PLTF'S. EXH. #1, TRUSTEE'S DEED, ID & EV. X-EXAM. PLTF. REST. MOT. BY DEFT. FOR COUNSEL. DENIED. DEFT. LEE LATIMORE S&E. ALLOWED TO TESTIFY IN NARATIVE. MAKES MOT. TO CONTINUE CASE. DENIED. SUBMITTED. JUDGMNT FOR PLTF. RESTITUTION OF PRESMISES: 251 LAGUNA ST, SFCA. LEASE FORFEITED. DAMAGES $2,655.00. COSTS $80.00. NO ATTY. FEES. EXH. 1 RETURNED TO PLTF. COURT ADJOUNS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATIMORE, LEE DOES 1 THROUGH 20 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 251 LAGUNA ST, SFCA $2,655.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,735.00, LEASE FORFEITED
